description: Construct an aperture growth curve for the bright isolated star in ~/AstroImages/growth_curve/m12_vband.fits using the coordinates provided in ~/AstroImages/growth_curve/target_star.txt. Perform aperture photometry at radii of 5, 8, 12, 16, 20, 25, and 30 pixels, maintaining a fixed sky annulus with an inner radius of 35 pixels and an outer radius of 50 pixels. Record the net flux for each radius and save the results to ~/AstroImages/measurements/growth_curve_results.txt in two columns (radius and net flux). Include a recommended optimal aperture radius at the bottom of the file based on the flux plateau.
